testcase.name: test_create_driver
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_drivers_geocode_ratings_iter56.py:84: in test_create_driver assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create driver: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create driver: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
